chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. CONST. PETITION No. D-2669 OF 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of Main Case 04.10.2021 Mr. Shahid Hussain Soomro Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Arshad H. Lodhi Advocate for the Respondent No.2..... Counsel for the Petitioner, on instructions, does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Amjad/PS
